title: rosa canina var. squarrosula
intro: Rosa canina var. squarrosula, also known as the prickly rose or wild rose, is a variety of the rose species Rosa canina that is characterized by its thorny branches and fragrant flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its high content of vitamins A and C, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rosa canina var. squarrosula include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Rosa canina var. squarrosula can be prepared as a tea, oil, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
